name: hackernews_trending
description: Discover trending stories on Hacker News. Fetches trending stories from the HN Firebase API with optional keyword filtering.

category.description: Story category: top, new, best, or ask

name: youtube_trending
description: Search YouTube for trending videos related to a topic, sorted by view count.

query.description: Search query related to the prospect's domain

name: devto_trending
description: Discover trending developer articles from the dev.to Forem API by tag.

name: wikipedia_summary
description: Get a Wikipedia REST API summary for a company, technology, or concept.

name: github_search
description: Search GitHub repositories for open-source projects.

sort.description: Sort by: stars, forks, or updated

name: lobsters_trending
description: Get trending stories from the Lobste.rs JSON API.

name: producthunt_trending
description: Discover trending products on Product Hunt via GraphQL API.

order.description: Sort: VOTES, RANKING, NEWEST, or FEATURED_AT

name: reddit_search
description: Search Reddit for posts matching a keyword across tech subreddits (SaaS, startups, devtools, selfhosted). Detects buying intent signals like recommendation-seeking, competitor frustration, and purchase intent.

sort.description: Sort: hot, new, top, or rising

time_filter.description: Time filter for top sort: hour, day, week, month

name: stackoverflow_search
description: Search Stack Overflow for questions about a technology or topic. Rising question counts indicate growing market demand. Unanswered questions signal unmet needs.

query.description: Search query (e.g. AI agent framework, vector database)

sort.description: Sort by: activity, votes, creation, relevance
